Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing park, fov 90
- residential road, 1-lane, concrete
- sidewalks absent, curbs absent
- driveways: center; parking: lot
- commercial building at left, 1 story, stucco, brick, glass, metal, flat roof, shallow setback
- commercial building at center, 1 story, concrete, brick, glass, flat roof, shallow setback
- utilities: street lamp, power lines, fire hydrant
- landscape: grass strip, planter, hedge, flower bed
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2025
Post-pandemic era. A 2025 fuel stop — LED canopy, full-color digital price sign, and a convenience store selling fresh food.

PERIOD DETAILS
- large convenience store with 'FRESH FOOD — MADE TO ORDER' branding
- free air and vacuum station at the lot edge
- price sign showing gas around $3.40
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of Shell
- window signs: 'COLD BREW $3.99', 'HOT PIZZA SLICES $2.99'
- outdoor cafe barriers with planters by the coffee lane
- a kick scooter leaning by the store wall
Typography: minimalist geometric sans-serif, heavily simplified flat logos.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 4 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a driver watching the ad screen while fueling
- a driver self-serving at the pump
- a woman filming a short vertical video on a phone
Clothing: men in oversized fit tees, chunky sneakers; women in athleisure, leggings and oversized hoodies. Fashion palette: sage green, beige, cream. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 3 period vehicles, all different:
- 2019-2025 Ram 1500 — crew cab pickup, large grille — blue
- 2022-2025 Honda Civic — clean mature compact — black
- 2020-2025 Hyundai Tucson — sharp parametric grille design — gray
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2025.
PLACEMENT: the first two parked on the LEFT side; the rest parked on the RIGHT side. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead lines in older areas, underground in new developments, fiber optic widespread

TREES
- deciduous tree at left: maturing tree
- deciduous tree at background: maturing tree
- conifer tree at right: mature tree, large canopy
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — smartphone or mirrorless camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: very clean, minimal to no noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2019-2025 Ram 1500 — crew cab pickup, large grille
2020-2025 Hyundai Tucson — sharp parametric grille design
